creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the quick update.

Please submit future patches as diffs against the ports repository in "git-format-patch" format.  If you just diff a random subdir, it's much more annoying to apply the patch.

The rc script you package is very wordy.  There's generally no need to comment on the obvious.  You should assume that whoever reads your script is familiar with the structure of an rc script.  Check other scripts in the ports tree and adjust the commenting style based on them.  This is not a must, but it would be more idiomatic.

I'll commit your port as is, but check if you can improve it in a future update.
